HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification:
Plaintiff's motion to compel production of documents is granted. Defendant is ordered to produce, or make available for inspection, responsive documents pursuant to the stipulated protective order in this action. The absence of a finalized protective order in the related action does not excuse the obligation to produce written discovery. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to a mutually convenient time for production or inspection. Said production or inspection shall be completed no later than January 13, 2005.
